suite.name: Tests
Remote Cpe Reboot

kw.name: Setup Reboot Test Suite
Get Device By Type
kw.doc: Get a device by its type name.

kw.name: Get Device By Type
kw.doc: Get a device by its type name.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: A CPE is online and fully provisioned
kw.msg: Querying CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 via ACS to confirm it's online and provisioned... CPE baseline state captured: firmware=3.0.2, uptime=10742s
kw.doc: Confirm CPE is online and provisioned via ACS.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Reboot test suite setup complete. CPE baseline: uptime=10742s
kw.arg: Reboot test suite setup complete. CPE baseline: uptime=${INITIAL_UPTIME}s
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Suite setup - get devices and verify CPE is online. Captures baseline state for all tests in this suite. Devices are dynamically discovered from Boardfarm.

test.name: UC-12347-Main: Successful Remote Reboot

kw.name: Set CPE GUI password
kw.msg: Searching through 11 users to find admin user... ✓ Found admin user at index 10 (username='admin') Using User.10 as GUI admin user Captured original user 10 (GUI admin) password Setting CPE GUI password for B66391-SNB66391EAE042... ✓ Password change attempted (could not verify)
kw.doc: Set CPE GUI password via ACS using TR-069 SPV.

kw.name: The operator initiates a reboot task on the ACS for the CPE
kw.msg: Operator initiating reboot task for CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 via ACS... ✓ Reboot task created successfully for CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 (test started at 2026-03-30 11:15:00.913023 UTC)
kw.doc: Operator initiates a reboot task on the ACS.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: The ACS sends a connection request to the CPE
kw.msg: Verifying connection request for CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042... ⚠ Connection request may not have been processed yet. Assuming sent (Reboot() was called).
kw.doc: ACS sends a connection request to the CPE.

kw.name: The CPE receives the connection request and initiates a session
kw.msg: Waiting for CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 to receive connection request and initiate session...
kw.doc: CPE receives connection request and initiates session.

kw.name: The CPE sends an Inform message to the ACS
kw.msg: Waiting for CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 to send Inform message (timeout=120s)... ✓ CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 sent Inform message (verified in GenieACS logs)
kw.doc: CPE sends an Inform message to the ACS.

kw.name: The ACS responds to the Inform message by issuing the Reboot RPC
kw.msg: Waiting for ACS to respond to Inform and issue Reboot RPC to CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042... ✓ ACS responded to Inform and issued Reboot RPC to CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 (verified in GenieACS CWMP logs)
kw.doc: ACS responds to Inform and issues Reboot RPC.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: The CPE sends an Inform message after boot completion
kw.msg: Waiting for CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 to complete boot and send post-reboot Inform message... ✓ CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 sent post-reboot Inform message at 2026-03-30 11:16:33.494000 UTC ↻ Refreshing CPE console connection after reboot... ✓ Console connection refreshed successfully
kw.doc: CPE sends Inform after boot completion.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: The CPE resumes normal operation
kw.msg: Verifying CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 has resumed normal operation (timeout=60s)... ✓ CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042 has resumed normal operation and periodic communication
kw.doc: CPE resumes normal operation.

kw.name: The CPE is online via ACS
kw.doc: Verify CPE is online via ACS.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CPE is online - basic configuration verification passed
kw.arg: CPE is online - basic configuration verification passed
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Use case succeeds and all success guarantees are met
kw.msg: Verifying all success guarantees for CPE B66391-SNB66391EAE042... ✓ CPE successfully rebooted and completed boot sequence ✓ CPE reconnected to ACS after reboot ✓ ACS correctly identified reboot event via Inform message ✓ CPE configuration and operational state preserved ✓ CPE resumed normal operation and periodic communication ✓ All success guarantees met. Use case succeeded.
kw.doc: Verify all success guarantees are met.

test.doc: Main success scenario for remote CPE reboot. Given the operator initiates a reboot task on the ACS for the CPE, the ACS sends a connection request, issues the Reboot RPC, and the CPE completes the boot sequence and resumes normal operation. Requires: ACS, CPE

kw.name: Teardown Testbed Connection
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Refresh CPE Console Connection
Get CPE Device
Get Device By Type
kw.doc: Get a device by its type name.
Get CPE device instance. Returns cached instance if available.

kw.name: Refresh CPE Console Connection
kw.msg: ↻ Refreshing CPE console connection... ✓ Console connection refreshed successfully
kw.doc: Refresh CPE console connection (disconnect + reconnect).

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Refresh CPE console connection (useful after reboot).
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Common suite teardown - clean up testbed connection.

suite.doc:
UC-12347: Remote CPE Reboot As an operator of a network, I want to remotely reboot a CPE device so that I can restore connectivity, apply configuration changes, or resolve operational issues without physical access to the device.
Corresponds to tests/features/Remote CPE Reboot.feature
Device Requirements: - ACS (Auto Configuration Server) - CPE (Customer Premises Equipment) All device properties are obtained dynamically from device objects.

Boardfarm BDD Robot Framework Test Suites
This test suite contains Robot Framework implementations of BDD scenarios that correspond to the system use cases defined in requirements/.
All tests use scenario-aligned keyword libraries that mirror the pytest-bdd step definitions, providing consistent behavior across both frameworks.
Test Suites: - hello.robot: Basic smoke tests - remote_cpe_reboot.robot: UC-12347 Remote CPE Reboot - user_makes_one_way_call.robot: UC-12348 Voice Call Tests - acs_gui_device_management.robot: UC-ACS-GUI-01 GUI Management - device_class_initialization.robot: Device Class Tests
